title: G2PLUS Lemon Yellow Organza Gift Pouches, 10x15 CM Medium Organza Favour Bags, 50 PCS Wedding Jewelry Bags, Clear Mesh Pouches Perfect for Wedding, Christmas, Birthday, Anniversary
features: 【Material】These gift bags are made of organza, the bags are very tight, but also very permeable for various scents. works great with lavender.
【Size】This jewellery pouches is 10CM*15CM. please allow 0.5-1cm error due to manual measurement. These small favor bags are ideal for wrapping gifts.
【Really well made】These wedding favor bags are really well made, the band at the top edge can be pulled together evenly and well. They are durable and reusable.

【Ideal Gift Bags】The organza bags are very beautiful and make a good gift for small things. as wedding favor bags, Christmas favor bags, baby shower favor bags, manufactured jewelry bags and lavender bags.

【Variuosly Application】Beautiful organza gift pouchs always bringing more cordiality. These organza bags are for packing small items for wedding favors, candy, christening almonds, Christmas favors, manufactured jewelry. You can also use these organza bags in a garden to put the vines inside for protection from animals.
description: Product Description Organza Bags in Various Sizes These organza bags are available in three sizes: 7×9 cm, 10×15 cm and 13×18 cm. Please note a tolerance of 0.5-1 cm due to hand measurement. Ideal for wrapping gifts. Clear Mesh Drawstring Organza Bags Organza Gift Bags Crafted from premium organza, these bags are lightweight, strong, and breathable. The material is soft, durable, and offers a delicate, sheer finish. Organza Drawstring Bags The drawstring closure allows for easy adjustment and secure fastening, keeping contents safe while offering a simple and practical design. Well Stiched Made The threading of the bottom and side of the mesh bag is perfectly combined, and the stitching is neat. Clear Mesh Bags These clear mesh bags offer visibility of the contents. The breathable material provides a practical and stylish solution for storing or gifting item. Organza Bags for Baby Shower, Birthday, Party Favour Perfect for gifting, weddings, or everyday storage, this versatile bag holds jewellery, cosmetics, or small keepsakes with ease. Its chic design makes it ideal for parties, favours, or simply adding style to daily organisation.
